nasb.text: After eight days His disciples were again inside, and Thomas with them. Jesus *came, the doors having been shut, and stood in their midst and said, “Peace be with you.”

esv.text: Eight days later, his disciples were inside again, and Thomas was with them. Although the doors were locked, Jesus came and stood among them and said, “Peace be with you.”

cnv.text: 過了八天，門徒又在屋子裡，多馬也和他們在一起。門戶都關上了。耶穌來了，站在他們中間，說：“願你們平安。”

ccb.text: 过了八天，门徒又聚在一起，多马也在，门都关着。突然耶稣来了，站在他们当中说：“愿你们平安！”

csbs.text: 八天后，耶稣的门徒们又在屋里，多马也与他们在一起。门户已经关上了，耶稣却出现，站在他们当中说：“愿你们平安！”
